name: Boston Chicken's Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: Dry spiral-shaped pasta, 3 cups (cook al dente)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place milk in the top of a double boiler over gently simmering water.
2. Add Velveeta cheese, stirring occasionally until melted and smooth.
3. Stir in dry mustard powder, ground turmeric, salt, and pepper.
4. Add the cooked pasta to the hot cheese mixture and keep warm until serving time.
5. If the mixture thickens, dilute with a little milk before serving.
6. Serve over hot water, up to an hour before eating.
- This yields 8 side servings or 4 main-dish servings.
